allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); done=sum\(1 for d in data if d['status']=='completed'\); ip=sum\(1 for d in data if d['status']=='in_progress'\); total=len\(data\); print\(f'Daily Call Plan - MR 1\\nTotal: {total} | Completed: {done} | In Progress: {ip} | Pending: {total-done-ip}\\nCompletion: {done/total*100:.1f}%' if total>0 else 'No plans today'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Created schedule id={d[\\"id\\"]} for Dr. Ramesh Gupta'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Dr. Anil Kumar: success={d.get\(\\"success\\"\)}, status={d.get\(\\"schedule\\",{}\).get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Dr. Ramesh Gupta: status={d.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\)" echo "" echo "=== DAILY CALL PLAN STATUS ===" curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/daily-call-plan?mr_id=1&date=2026-04-07")

Bash(python -c " import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) total = sum\(s.get\('amount',0\) for s in d\) print\(f' {len\(d\)} sales, total={total:,.0f}'\) " echo "5. Expenses:" curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/expenses")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); done=sum\(1 for d in data if d['status']=='completed'\); ip=sum\(1 for d in data if d['status']=='in_progress'\); total=len\(data\); print\(f'Daily Call Plan - MR 1\\nTotal: {total} | Completed: {done} | In Progress: {ip} | Pending: {total-done-ip}\\nCompletion: {done/total*100:.1f}%' if total>0 else 'No plans today'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); done=sum\(1 for x in d if x['status']=='completed'\); ip=sum\(1 for x in d if x['status']=='in_progress'\); total=len\(d\); pending=total-done-ip; pct=f'{done/total*100:.1f}%' if total>0 else 'N/A'; print\(f'Daily Call Plan - MR 1\\nTotal: {total} | Completed: {done} | In Progress: {ip} | Pending: {pending}\\nCompletion: {pct}'\)")
